memoryArtifacts.headline: The Tremaine Story up to Thomas Tremaine, died 1563
memoryArtifacts.description:
Dates John de Tremaen married Margery Antron
John’s son Peter/Perys, married Elinor Canterbury, by whom he had John de Tremaen, and then he married Nicola de Reskywes, by whom he had Peter de Tremaen …

zh.Collacombe Manor, Lamerton, Devon, Engla: 英國英格蘭戴文拉梅頓
zh.Lamerton, Devon, England: 英國英格蘭戴文拉梅頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Nicholas Tremayne於1368年出生在英國英格蘭戴文拉梅頓時，他的父親Thomas Tremayne26歲，母親Isabella Trenchard22歲。他於1390年與Joan Dodscombe在英國英格蘭戴文結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1445年在他的家鄉享年77歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Nicholas Tremayne于1368年出生在英国英格兰戴文拉梅頓时，他的父亲Thomas Tremayne26岁，母亲Isabella Trenchard22岁。他于1390年与Joan Dodscombe在英国英格兰戴文结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1445年在他的家乡享年77岁。

nameMeanings.name: Tremayne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Tremaine
meanings: Cornish: habitational name from one or more places in Cornwall named Tremayne (Saint Columb Major, Crowan, Saint Martin in Meneage), Tremaine, or Tremain (Pelynt). The placenames all derive from Middle Cornish tre ‘estate, farmstead’ + men ‘stone’, with the exception of Tremaine, which may have menegh, plural of manach ‘monk’, as the final element.

nameMeanings.name: Nicholas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nickolas
meanings: Mainly U.S.: variant spelling of   Nicholas  , influenced by the short form   Nick .

en.lifeSummary: When Nicholas Tremayne was born in 1368, in Lamerton, Devon, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas Tremayne, was 26 and his mother, Isabella Trenchard, was 22. He married Joan Dodscombe in 1390, in Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died in 1445, in his hometown, at the age of 77.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nicholas Tremayne est né en 1368, à Lamerton, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Tremayne, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Isabella Trenchard, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Joan Dodscombe en 1390, à Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé en 1445, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 77 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Nicholas Tremayne 1368 in Lamerton, Devon, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Tremayne 26 und seine Mutter Isabella Trenchard 22. Er hat 1390 in Devon, England, United Kingdom Joan Dodscombe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb 1445 im Alter von 77 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas Tremayne è nato il nel 1368 nel Lamerton, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Thomas Tremayne, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Isabella Trenchard, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Joan Dodscombe nel 1390, nel Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì nel 1445, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 77 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Nicholas Tremayneが1368年にイギリスイギリスデボンラムルトンで生まれた時，父Thomas Tremayneは26歳，母Isabella Trenchardは22歳であった。1390年にイギリスイギリスデボンでJoan Dodscombeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1445年に故郷で77歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Nicholas Tremayne(이)가 1368년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 램르턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Tremayne(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabella Trenchard(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1390년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰에서 Joan Dodscombe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1445년 그의 고향에서 77세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas Tremayne nasceu em 1368, em Lamerton, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Tremayne, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Isabella Trenchard, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Dodscombe em 1390, em Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1445, em sua cidade natal, com 77 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nicholas Tremayne родился в 1368 г. в местности лэмиртон, девон, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas Tremayne было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabella Trenchard, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Dodscombe в 1390 г. в местности девон, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер в 1445 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 77 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Nicholas Tremayne nació en 1368, en Lamerton, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas Tremayne, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Isabella Trenchard, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Joan Dodscombe en 1390, en Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió en 1445, en su pueblo, a la edad de 77 años.
